title: Station 2 – Ex 9: Letter to Ruby (Agony Aunt – Modal Substitutes)
description: Modalverb-Ersatzformen im Simple Present und Simple Past. Mehrere Formate werden akzeptiert – trenne Varianten mit Komma (z.B. 'can't, am not allowed to').

items.question: On weekdays I ___ spend much time with my friends. (darf nicht / kann nicht)
I ___ be home at 6 o'clock every evening. (muss)
Another rule is that I ___ stay up after 8 o'clock. (darf nicht)
My big brother ___ stay up as long as he liked. (durfte – Vergangenheit)
He ___ be at home at any special time. (musste nicht)
I ___ go to the sleepover because I was too young. (durfte nicht – Vergangenheit)
We always fight and we ___ find a compromise. (können nicht)
I'm a teenager now and I ___ look after myself. (kann)
Kompromiss → Englisch
auf sich selbst aufpassen → look after ___
Kummerkastentante → agony ___
obwohl → ___
Although I'm thirteen, I feel my parents think I'm a ___. (Baby)
Sleepover-Party → have a ___
Das ist nicht fair! → It's not ___!
Please give me some advice ___ I go crazy! (bevor)
I ___ lots of discussions with my parents. (Present Perfect von 'have')
They make all the ___ and I have to follow them. (Regeln)
I know my parents worry ___ me. (Präposition)
Diskussionen führen → to ___ discussions
